focus: Copilot target-authority boundary plus isolated graph degradation harness
keyFindings: Copilot userPromptSubmitted hook cannot mutate the just-submitted prompt; it refreshes file-based custom instructions and returns an empty JSON object, so Gate 3 enforcement must ride in the delegated prompt/wrapper or force plan-only behavior.

cli-copilot skill already states the conductor must pass an active Gate-3 spec folder or ask before delegating because the delegated agent cannot answer Gate 3 interactively; this is the minimal authority seam to harden.
A deterministic degraded code-graph stress cell can set SPEC_KIT_DB_DIR to a temp directory, producing an isolated empty code-graph.sqlite without touching the real graph DB.

code_graph_query already emits fallbackDecision for empty and stale full-scan states with allowInlineFullScan:false; the v1.0.3 proof should target query first, while code_graph_context alignment is a secondary consistency improvement.
